instruction: Add an event titled {TARGET} to the calendar store without changing any existing event.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity, §7 WAL checkpoint). Tier-B sqlite read; runner checkpoints the WAL. AndroidWorld validate_rows_addition_integrity.

args: rm -rf "$HOME/.guibench/caldb"; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench/caldb" "$HOME/.guibench"; DB="$HOME/.guibench/caldb/{STORE}"; sqlite3 "$DB" 'CREATE TABLE events(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT);'; sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO events(id,title) VALUES(1,'Holiday'),(2,'Payday');"; sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT id||'|'||title FROM events ORDER BY id" > "$HOME/.guibench/{STORE}.before"

result.query: SELECT id||'|'||title FROM events ORDER BY id;
